rulings.Case Title: JESSIE MENDOZA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 22, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANTS MAERSK, INC., AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD., CROWLEY MARITIME CORPORATION, MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC., AND NEDLLOYD LINES (USA) CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEMURRERS FOR UNCERTAINTY ARE DISFAVORED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES A BREACH OF THE DUTY OF CARE FOR AREAS UNDER DEFENDANTS' CONTROL. (PARAGRAPHS 78-79 & 82). DEFENDANT'S DUTY IS NOT BREACHED BY A FAILURE TO PROVIDE RESPIRATORY EQUIPMENT OR TO PLACE WARNING SIGNS. HOWLETT V. BIRKDALE SHIPPING CO. S.A. (1994) 512 U.S. 92, 98; WHITEHILL V. UNITED STATES LINES (1986) 177 CAL.APP. 3D 1201, 1207. DEFENDANT MUST ADDRESS EXTRANEOUS ALLEGATIONS BY FILING A MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO SUCH ALLEGATIONS IN THE 6TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JESSIE MENDOZA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 22, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANTS KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC., MAERSK, INC., AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD., CROWLEY MARITIME CORPORATION, MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC., NEDLLOYD LINES (USA) CORPORATION'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint. THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S REFERENCES TO LAND BASED FACILITIES AS WELL AS TO PARAGRAPH 87, WHICH IS UNNECESSARY GIVEN THE ALLEGATIONS OF PARAGRAPHS 90-94. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CHATEAU DE LOUIS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. EVEREST INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 22, 2008, line 9, DEFENDANT EVEREST INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE BAD FAITH CLAIM AND ATTORNEYS' FEES. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THAT PINEWAVE'S RIGHTS WERE ASSIGNED TO PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A CLAIM AS A JUDGMENT CREDITOR. SAN DIEGO HOUSING COMM. V. INDUSTRIAL INDEMNITY CO. (2002) 95 CAL.APP. 4TH 669, 691. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE A BASIS FOR THE RIGHT TO ATTORNEYS' FEES. DENIED AS TO GENERAL DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF IS NOT SEEKING EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CHATEAU DE LOUIS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. EVEREST INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 22, 2008, line 9, DEFENDANT EVEREST INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE DECISION IN MONTGOMERY WARD & CO. V. IMPERIAL CASUALTY & INDEMNITY CO. (2000) 81 CAL.APP.4TH 356 IS PERSUASIVE AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT'S OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. =(302/PJM/PB)
